title: session — PHP attribute contracts
description: One attribute — `#[AsSessionListener]` — marks a service class as a subscriber to session-lifecycle events. AttributeDiscovery scans + wires it to the event map declared in events.json.

attributes.name: AsSessionListener

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names. Empty = subscribe to every event in Academorix\Sports\Session\Events\*. Names validated against events.json at boot.
